title: Looking to hire an expert ASAP (Real Estate)
excerpt: Hi looking to hire an expert to create workflows. I want to begin with a calendar integration and then continue to work through each board. I am in the Real Estate industry. I am based in New Jersey. Please reach out to A…

posts.author: KellyFernandes (Kelly Fernandes )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi looking to hire an expert to create workflows. I want to begin with a calendar integration and then continue to work through each board. I am in the Real Estate industry. I am based in New Jersey. Please reach out to Assistant.KellyFernandes@gmail.com or respond to this thread.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @KellyFernandes and welcome to the monday.com community!

It sounds like you have an interesting workflow to build on and I would love to see how the team at CarbonWeb might be able to help. We have developed a few different custom components to ensure our partners workflows are optimized and sustainable for their business.

I’d like to extend a free consultation to you in order to explore this project. If you would like to connect and discuss please schedule some time here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you continue to use monday.com!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml: We love working with real estate folks! We are a small and passionate team in North America and a monday.com gold partner. We would love to speak with you. Please email jenna@iointegration.com to set up a free consultation. Hope to hear from you!

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @KellyFernandes

Welcome to the monday Community!

We have been partnered with monday.com since 2017.

We specialise in building custom workflows, integrations, automations to make monday.com platform even more powerful within your workspace.

Please book in a complimentary non obligation session here to discuss further.

We would love to hear more on what you would like to achieve and help you achieve your goals on the platform.

Kind Regards,
Cleopatra Luneburg
upstream

posts.cookedHtml:
